programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A Minnesota couple is eager to combine their families into one home in the Twin Cities; she's hoping to find a turnkey craftsman with nearby neighbors, but he wants to find a home that comes with a lot of land and plenty of projects to keep him busy.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A young woman wants a fixer-upper, but her family is steering her away from renovation work.

programme.sub-title: Big Family With a Tall Order in Lincoln City, Oregon

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah dives into some of the cheesiest dishes, both savory and sweet; deep fried mac and cheese at the Calgary Stampede in Canada; Cowboy Pistolettes in Texas; classic cheese curds in Wisconsin; bacon-covered New York cheesecake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe travels to festivals and fairs across the country in search of frankly delicious dogs; a crab dip smothered dog in Maryland; a cheesy, spicy chile relleno dog in California; dessert dogs covered in whipped cream and chocolate.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah visits the Prince William County Fair in Manassas, Va. and tries the Monumental Grilled Cheese and the Chesapeake Bay Poutine; at the Western Fair in London, Ontario, he dives into a Poutine Dog, the Macaroni Bowl and Cherry Cheesecake Tempura.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.sub-title: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Euro-fusion Greek pizza; Crabby Patty burger; deep-fried chili dog; Fluffernutter elephant ear pasty; beer-battered burger; Mississippi mud fry.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Jackfruit torta; peanut butter meatballs; cherry candy-coated hot wings; Ice Cream Garden; pulled pork rainbow melt.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Bacon, the Ugly
programme.desc: Texas State Fair in Dallas; bacon-tilla; chicken-fried lobster; carrot cake roll; deep-fried sweet potato pie; Oakland County Fair in Davisburg, Mich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah digs into morning meals with something for everyone, from the sinfully sweet cinnamon roll waffle to the hearty and delicious breakfast poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah samples seven berry sweet dishes; he discovers that berries are good on everything from savory Strawberry Arugula Pizza to the perfectly named Strawberry Waffle Bomb.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah stuffs himself with stuffed foods; from spicy Southern stuffed peppers to a sweet cherry-stuffed dessert, Noah indulges in some of the best stuffed sensations North America has to offer.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Tacos are more than a staple of Mexican cuisine, they're a carnival favorite; Noah eats seven of the nation's most creative tacos; from a fresh succulent soft shell crab taco to authentic Tacos Al Pastor, Noah gets wrapped up in tantalizing tacos.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple of first generation Americans are looking to move out of their parents' basement and into their first home in New Jersey; she can't stop flip flopping on her wish list and neither can agree on how big their backyard should be.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Fed up with city traffic, Atlanta buyers are leaving downtown for a home in the surrounding suburbs; they both want a large yard for their dogs, but they disagree on a single-story ranch vs. a two-story Cape Cod home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Married wedding photographers have decided to upsize from their 450-square-foot condo in Kittery, Maine, after their daughter moves back in with them; they agree that they don't want a place that's too big, but disagree on features and details.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Two rockers in New Jersey seek a home that fits their lifestyle; while the night owls agree they want a master with few windows, she looks for an older Colonial with lots of charm while he has his heart set on an updated mid-century modern.

programme.sub-title: Like Mother Unlike Daughter in Tallahassee

programme.desc: A couple from Humble, Texas, want to feel like they've finally made it by purchasing a big, new home for their growing family; she wants a two-story house with a grand entrance, while he hates the idea of walking up stairs.

programme.sub-title: Ready for a Family in Rochester

programme.sub-title: Sister Doesn't Know Best in San Antonio
